title: Design System: CIIP Flashcard Study App

headline.purpose: Page titles and study card question text.

title.purpose: Domain names, section headings, card option labels.

label.purpose: Badges, keyboard hints, metadata keys. All-caps only.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Stack domain grid 2-up, reduce card font sizes, compact rating buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Platinum on void — maximum contrast, used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #eceef8; color: #0a0b0e; padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 80ms linear; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent at rest, panel tint on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #6e7286; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #23262f; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #181c24; color: #e4e6f0; border-color: #23262f; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Domain Tile
components.description: Home screen grid card for a single CIIP exam domain.
components.html:
Domain F
Image Management
12 due
components.css: .ds-domain-tile { background: #181c24; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); position: relative; } .ds-domain-tile:hover { background: #1e2230; } .ds-domain-tile:hover .ds-tile-name { color: #eceef8; } .ds-tile-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6e7286; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-tile-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #e4e6f0; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.3; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-tile-due { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #eceef8; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-tile-due.zero { color: #6e7286; } .ds-maturity-bar { display: flex; height: 3px; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-mat-new { background: #6e7286; } .ds-mat-learning { background: #c69138; } .ds-mat-review { background: #3ea658; } .ds-mat-mastered { background: #8a67d4; }

components.name: Study Card — Front
components.description: Flashcard front face — question stem only.
components.html:
Question
Which DICOM service class is used to push image objects to a remote storage provider?
Space or click to reveal
components.css: .ds-card-front { background: #181c24; border-radius: 14px; padding: 28px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 300px; } .ds-card-hint { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6e7286; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-question { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #e4e6f0; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: -0.02em; flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-card-flip-hint { font-size: 11px; color: #6e7286; text-align: center; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 16px; }

components.name: Rating Button
components.css: .ds-rating-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .ds-rate { flex: 1; padding: 11px 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-key { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; opacity: 0.65; font-family: monospace; } .ds-rate-again { background: rgba(208,79,70,0.12); color: #d04f46; border-color: rgba(208,79,70,0.28); } .ds-rate-again:hover { background: rgba(208,79,70,0.22); } .ds-rate-hard { background: rgba(198,145,56,0.12); color: #c69138; border-color: rgba(198,145,56,0.28); } .ds-rate-hard:hover { background: rgba(198,145,56,0.22); } .ds-rate-good { background: rgba(62,166,88,0.12); color: #3ea658; border-color: rgba(62,166,88,0.28); } .ds-rate-good:hover { background: rgba(62,166,88,0.22); } .ds-rate-easy { background: rgba(236,238,248,0.10); color: #eceef8; border-color: rgba(236,238,248,0.22); } .ds-rate-easy:hover { background: rgba(236,238,248,0.18); }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-input { background: #181c24; border: 1px solid #23262f; border-radius: 6px; color: #e4e6f0; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6e7286; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #6e7286; }

components.name: Difficulty Badge
components.description: Card difficulty tag — easy / medium / hard.
components.css: .ds-badge { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; } .ds-badge-easy { background: rgba(62,166,88,0.15); color: #3ea658; } .ds-badge-medium { background: rgba(198,145,56,0.15); color: #c69138; } .ds-badge-hard { background: rgba(208,79,70,0.15); color: #d04f46; }

narrative.overview:
This is a precision instrument for a high-stakes professional credential. The CIIP exam is real — the person studying for it is technically literate and under real pressure. Every design decision should reflect that context. The interface behaves like a clinical workstation: information is displayed with maximal clarity, interactive elements announce themselves without decoration, and nothing exists on screen without a reason. The emotional register is calm, capable, and focused — not motivational, not playful, not celebratory.

Depth comes from tonal layering, not borders or shadows. The darkest layer (#0a0b0e) is the ground. Surfaces (#12141b), panels (#181c24), and elevated cards lift off it through value alone — borders are reserved for structural divisions, not decorative frames. The platinum accent (#eceef8) is used with extreme restraint: it is the one bright signal in a field of near-black. When it appears, it means 'this is the action.'
keyCharacteristics: Tonal elevation — depth from value, not shadow or border density
Platinum as the one accent — rare, decisive, never decorative
Clinical typography — tight tracking on headings, generous line-height on body
Semantic color kept functional — red/amber/green/violet are SRS ratings only
Keyboard-first affordances — every primary action has a key hint

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Platinum is the only accent. It does not share accent duties with any semantic color.

rules.name: The No-Inversion Rule
rules.body: Do not use semantic colors for backgrounds. Tints (rgba) permitted only for rating buttons — nowhere else.

rules.name: The No-Caps-Creep Rule
rules.body: Uppercase labels are permitted only at 11px or smaller. Never uppercase at 12px or above.

rules.name: The Weight Discipline Rule
rules.body: Two weights only: 400 and 600–700. Never 300 or 500.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at all times. Tonal contrast from Void → Panel provides elevation. No box-shadow on cards at rest.

rules.name: The Single Border Weight
rules.body: All structural borders are 1px solid Trace. No 2px borders, no colored accent borders, no left-stripe borders of any width.

dos: Do use tonal steps (Void → Console → Panel) as the only depth mechanism.
Do use Platinum exclusively for primary interactive elements — one voice, one purpose.
Do keep semantic colors strictly tied to SRS rating feedback.
Do use uppercase Label style (11px, 0.07em) for badges and keyboard hints only.
Do include keyboard shortcut hints next to every primary action.
Do design the study card as the primary hero of the app.
donts: Don't use border-left stripes of any width as colored accents.
Don't use the GitHub UI color palette (#0d1117, #58a6ff, #161b22).
Don't use glassmorphism or decorative backdrop-filter blur.
Don't design for gamified engagement (confetti, streak-hero UIs, mascots).
Don't use Generic SaaS aesthetics (teal-white pairs, pill buttons, hero-metric dashboards).
Don't add shadows to cards or domain tiles at rest.
Don't use 500 font-weight — jump from 400 to 600.
Don't use colored accent borders on cards or list items.
